case_title: TROY OKUMURA VS. WENDY YUEN KUEN TAM

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-09-2019 - CONTINUED FOR INTERPRETER TO JAN-30-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF TROY OKUMURA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WENDY YUEN KUEN TAM IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-30-2019 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $40.00) SERVED NOV-29-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT TAM, WENDY YUEN KUEN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-30-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-30-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF TROY OKUMURA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WENDY YUEN KUEN TAM IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED CANTONESE INTERPRETER REBECCA CHAU. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OKUMURA, TROY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TAM, WENDY YUEN KUEN $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,115.00 PAYMENTS ARE TO BE MADE AT THE RATE OF $500.00 PER MONTH, BEGINNING ON MAR-15-2019 AND ON THE 15TH DAY OF EACH MONTH THEREAFTER STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY OKUMURA, TROY AS TO DEFENDANT TAM, WENDY YUEN KUEN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-09-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR INTERPRETER. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.
